pi_items.source: Task description step 2a matches metadata claim exactly
Verified via farmOS.org documentation - Input is a valid log type used to record resources (like fertilizer) put into assets. Task description step 2b confirms changing log type to 'Input'.
Task description step 2c specifies setting hour to 08, minutes to 00, and selecting AM
Task description step 2d specifies entering exactly this text in the Notes field
Task description step 2e specifies toggling the 'Done' switch to OFF (false)

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a detailed input log entry in farmOS Field Kit (v0.8.0), a real farm management application. Input is a verified log type used to record farm resources like fertilizer. The log is created with name 'Applied fertilizer to north field', time set to 08:00 AM, notes '10-10-10 fertilizer, 200 lbs per acre', and Done toggle set to OFF. All metadata claims match the task instruction requirements exactly. The task uses synthetic test data designed specifically for UI automation verification.
